items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Results of Operations · Officer / Director Departure or Appointment · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Great Elm Q1 2026 NII rises 13% to $0.36; names new CEO
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital Q1 2026 NII grew 13% QoQ to $0.36/share and NAV was $7.74; adviser waived $2.8M in accrued incentive fees and Jason Reese was named CEO.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Great Elm redeems 5.875% notes due 2026 on May 27, 2026
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital issued a notice of redemption for its 5.875% Notes due 2026, with a redemption date of May 27, 2026.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Officer / Director Departure or Appointment · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Great Elm FY2025 results; Jason Reese named executive chairman
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital reported Q4 and full-year 2025 results and named Jason Reese as Executive Chairman, succeeding Matthew Drapkin.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Great Elm redeems 5.875% notes due 2026 on March 31, 2026
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital issued a notice of conditional redemption for its 5.875% Notes due 2026, with a redemption date of March 31, 2026.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Great Elm Q3 2025 NAV falls to $10.01 on First Brands losses
items.snippet: Great Elm Q3 2025 NAV dropped to $10.01/share from $12.10 primarily due to losses on First Brands; board maintained the $0.37/share distribution and authorized $10M buyback.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Great Elm addresses First Brands exposure amid investor concerns
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital provided an update on its First Brands Group investment in response to numerous investor inquiries about its automotive parts manufacturer exposure.

items.headline_ai: Great Elm raises $15M equity at $11.65 per share in 9.9% stake sale
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital issued approximately 1.3M shares at $11.65/share for $15M gross proceeds to an affiliate of newly appointed Great Elm Group director Booker Smith.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Great Elm upsizes revolving credit facility to $50M from $25M
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital amended its revolving credit facility with City National Bank to increase borrowing capacity to $50M from $25M.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Great Elm Q2 2025 total investment income hits record $14.3M
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital reported record total investment income of $14.3M in Q2 2025, with the highest cash generation in company history.

items.snippet: Great Elm Capital reported Q1 2025 results and raised its quarterly distribution 5.7% to $0.37/share from $0.35/share.

items.snippet: Great Elm Capital reported Q4 and full-year 2024 results, noting it raised $13.2M in equity at NAV in December 2024 from Summit Grove Partners.

items.snippet: Great Elm Capital declared a $0.05/share special cash distribution payable January 15, 2025, and approved a Q1 2025 distribution of $0.37/share.

items.headline_ai: Great Elm raises $13.2M equity at NAV of $12.06 per share
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital issued approximately 1.1M shares at NAV of $12.06/share for $13.2M to Summit Grove Partners, with Great Elm Group investing $3.3M in SGP.

items.headline_ai: Great Elm Q3 2024 NII at $0.39 per share
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital reported Q3 2024 NII of $4.1M or $0.39/share for the quarter ended September 30, 2024.

items.snippet: Great Elm Capital issued $22M of additional 8.50% notes due 2029 (GECCI) in a registered direct offering to an institutional investor.

items.headline_ai: Great Elm extends revolving credit facility to 2027, cuts rate by 50 basis points
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital amended its $25M revolving credit facility to extend maturity to May 2027 and reduced borrowing rates by 50 basis points.

items.snippet: Great Elm Capital issued conditional notices to holders of its 6.50% Notes due 2024 regarding its exercise of option to redeem the notes in full.

items.headline_ai: Great Elm Q2 2023 NII grows 19% to $0.44 per share
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital reported Q2 2023 NII grew 19% to $3.4M or $0.44/share, compared to $2.8M in the prior year quarter.

items.snippet: Great Elm Capital announced its 2023 Annual Stockholders' Meeting will be held June 1, 2023.

items.headline_ai: Great Elm FY2022 NII at $0.30 per share in Q4
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital reported Q4 and full-year 2022 results with Q4 NII of $2.3M or $0.30/share.

items.headline_ai: Great Elm launches Great Elm Healthcare Finance venture with Berkadia
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital launched Great Elm Healthcare Finance, LLC with a Berkadia affiliate to provide capital to US healthcare-related businesses.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Great Elm Q3 2022 results; launches healthcare finance platform with Berkadia
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital reported Q3 2022 results and noted it formed Great Elm Healthcare Finance, a specialty asset-based lending platform led by industry veteran Mike Gervais.

items.headline_ai: Great Elm Q2 2022 results; completes rights offering selling 3M shares at $12.50
items.snippet: Great Elm Capital reported Q2 2022 results; the company completed its rights offering selling approximately 3.0M shares of common stock for aggregate gross proceeds.

items.snippet: Great Elm Capital announced its 2022 Annual Stockholders' Meeting will be held August 1, 2022.
